description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house complex featuring multiple interconnected structures and extensive landscaped grounds. The main building is rectangular with flat roofs, large windows, and several outdoor terraces. The property includes a tennis court, a formal garden with geometric hedges, a swimming pool, and a detached garage or guest house. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker accents and abundant glass surfaces. Trees and manicured shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing its upscale suburban character. The overall design emphasizes symmetry, open space, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A sprawling modern luxury house with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a tennis court, and multiple outbuildings. The exterior is light gray and white with glass accents and formal greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the tennis court, main house, and landscaped garden with a pool and geometric hedges, showing the full breadth of the property.
description_view_1: The front approach reveals the main entryway, formal garden, and driveway, with the house's symmetrical facade and detached structures visible.
description_view_2: A side perspective displays the garage or guest house, the rear of the main building, and the arrangement of trees and hedges along the property edge.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the tennis court, rear garden, and the back of the main house, with the entryway and driveway less visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat-roofed overhang, large glass doors, and a formal driveway approach with minimal steps and no porch.
